name: Robustness - Endless Loop Protection
description: Caller circles indefinitely without accepting resolution.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: I have a question about my battery warranty. Actually, first explain how warranties work in general.
expectedOutcome: Conversation hits designed max-turn/no-progress limits gracefully, offers a concrete closing path (website or transfer), and ends cleanly instead of looping forever.
